inputs.srepr: Mul(Rational(1, 2), Symbol('K_k', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Add(Symbol('kappa', positive=True, real=True), Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('kappa_min', positive=True, real=True))), Integer(2)))
Mul(Symbol('K_k', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('mu_k', positive=True, real=True), Add(Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('kappa', positive=True, real=True)), Symbol('kappa_min', positive=True, real=True)))

output.srepr: Mul(Add(Symbol('kappa_0', positive=True, real=True), Mul(Symbol('kappa_min', positive=True, real=True), exp(Mul(Symbol('K_k', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('mu_k', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('t', positive=True, real=True)))), Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('kappa_min', positive=True, real=True))), exp(Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('K_k', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('mu_k', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('t', positive=True, real=True))))

method: solve kappa_dot = -mu_k*K_k*(kappa-kappa_min) for constant kappa_min; gives exponential decay
scope: quadratic local minimum and constant kappa_min; K_k and mu_k not derived
